name: Kolowalu Park Playground
tagline: Oahu's first inclusive playground — ramps, sensory panels, accessible swings for every kid.
bestTime: Late afternoon when it cools down; mornings on weekends before it gets busy
talkStory: Opened in 2022 as part of Ward Village, Kolowalu Park is Oahu's first fully inclusive playground, designed with disability advocates and occupational therapists. Every element -- ramps, transfer platforms, sensory panels, and adaptive swings -- ensures kids of all abilities play together. The rubberized ground surface stays cooler than sand or concrete in the Hawaiian sun. The adjacent dog park and Ward Village shops make it easy to spend a full morning.
